name: subscription-proration
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/billing.js, dispatch key 'billing.subscription-proration'); the SubscriptionBillingSuite lens calls it via lensRun('billing','subscription-proration'). In-memory per-user state in globalThis._concordSTATE.billingLens. Money inputs come from STORED plan amounts (plan.amount is clamped at create via billNum + Math.max(0,…)) and the stored period window, NOT from user-supplied amounts — so proration is fail-CLOSED by construction (a poisoned amount can never have been persisted onto a plan). The assassin's fresh state has no plans/subs, so every fuzz call rejects ok:false with a string error (subscription/plan not found). Pinned by server/tests/billing-lens-macros.test.js (exact upgrade credit/charge + downgrade direction + apply round-trip).
